'''âs-j-v''' ('''sajava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machinofacture|machinofacture]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machinofacture|machinofacture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-j-v
|-
! Lemma
| sajava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sajavithi|sajavithi]] || [[word:sajaviji|sajaviji]] || [[word:sajavishi|sajavishi]] || [[word:sajavi|sajavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sajavuthuth|sajavuthuth]] || [[word:sajavujuj|sajavujuj]] || [[word:sajavushush|sajavushush]] || [[word:sajav|sajav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sajavuthu|sajavuthu]] || [[word:sajavuju|sajavuju]] || [[word:sajavushu|sajavushu]] || [[word:sajavu|sajavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sajavufuth|sajavufuth]] || [[word:sajavufuj|sajavufuj]] || [[word:sajavufush|sajavufush]] || [[word:sajavuf|sajavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sajavethe|sajavethe]] || [[word:sajaveje|sajaveje]] || [[word:sajaveshe|sajaveshe]] || [[word:sajave|sajave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sajavothoth|sajavothoth]] || [[word:sajavojoj|sajavojoj]] || [[word:sajavoshosh|sajavoshosh]] || [[word:sajav|sajav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sajavotho|sajavotho]] || [[word:sajavojo|sajavojo]] || [[word:sajavosho|sajavosho]] || [[word:sajavo|sajavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sajavofoth|sajavofoth]] || [[word:sajavofoj|sajavofoj]] || [[word:sajavofosh|sajavofosh]] || [[word:sajavof|sajavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sajavĂŠthĂŠ|sajavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sajavĂŠjĂŠ|sajavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sajavĂŠshĂŠ|sajavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sajavĂŠ|sajavĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sajavathath|sajavathath]] || [[word:sajavajaj|sajavajaj]] || [[word:sajavashash|sajavashash]] || [[word:sajav|sajav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sajavatha|sajavatha]] || [[word:sajavaja|sajavaja]] || [[word:sajavasha|sajavasha]] || [[word:sajava|sajava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sajavafath|sajavafath]] || [[word:sajavafaj|sajavafaj]] || [[word:sajavafash|sajavafash]] || [[word:sajavaf|sajavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sajavasha|sajavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosajavasha|gosajavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisajavasha|gokisajavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sajavnĂŒsha|sajavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosajavnknĂŒsha|gosajavnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisajavnĂŒsha|gokisajavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sajavshĂ«sha|sajavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosajavnkshĂ«sha|gosajavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisajavshĂ«sha|gokisajavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sajavrosha|sajavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosajavnkrosha|gosajavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisajavrosha|gokisajavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sajavmusha|sajavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosajavnkmusha|gosajavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisajavmusha|gokisajavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sajavsherasha|sajavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosajavnksherasha|gosajavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisajavsherasha|gokisajavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sajavngasha|sajavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosajavnkngasha|gosajavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisajavngasha|gokisajavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sajavyasha|sajavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosajavnkyasha|gosajavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisajavyasha|gokisajavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sajavyamasha|sajavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosajavnkyamasha|gosajavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisajavyamasha|gokisajavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sajavnĂŒshĂ«sha|sajavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosajavnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosajavnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisajavnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisajavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sajavnĂŒrosha|sajavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosajavnknĂŒrosha|gosajavnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisajavnĂŒrosha|gokisajavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sajavnĂŒmusha|sajavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosajavnknĂŒmusha|gosajavnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisajavnĂŒmusha|gokisajavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sajavshĂ«nĂŒsha|sajavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosajavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosajavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisajavshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisajavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sajavshĂ«rosha|sajavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosajavnkshĂ«rosha|gosajavnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisajavshĂ«rosha|gokisajavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sajavshĂ«musha|sajavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosajavnkshĂ«musha|gosajavnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisajavshĂ«musha|gokisajavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sajavronĂŒsha|sajavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosajavnkronĂŒsha|gosajavnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisajavronĂŒsha|gokisajavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sajavroshĂ«sha|sajavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosajavnkroshĂ«sha|gosajavnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisajavroshĂ«sha|gokisajavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sajavromusha|sajavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosajavnkromusha|gosajavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisajavromusha|gokisajavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sajavmunĂŒsha|sajavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosajavnkmunĂŒsha|gosajavnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisajavmunĂŒsha|gokisajavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sajavmushĂ«sha|sajavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosajavnkmushĂ«sha|gosajavnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisajavmushĂ«sha|gokisajavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sajavmurosha|sajavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosajavnkmurosha|gosajavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisajavmurosha|gokisajavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sajav|sajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠjĂŠv|sĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosajav|hosajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠjĂŠv|hosĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosajav|hohosajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠjĂŠv|hohosĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsajav|nĂŒsajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠjĂŠv|nĂŒsĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsajav|nĂŒnĂŒsajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠjĂŠv|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsajav|nĂŻsajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠjĂŠv|nĂŻsĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsajav|nĂŻnĂŻsajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠjĂŠv|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusajav|lusajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠjĂŠv|lusĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusajav|lulusajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠjĂŠv|lulusĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisajav|lisajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠjĂŠv|lisĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisajav|lilisajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠjĂŠv|lilisĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosajav|kosajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠjĂŠv|kosĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosajav|kokosajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠjĂŠv|kokosĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesajav|kesajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠjĂŠv|kesĂŠjĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesajav|kekesajav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠjĂŠv|kekesĂŠjĂŠv]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
